title: Hermes Self-Evolution Three-Layer Loop Light
brief: A clean, modern technical infographic on a PURE WHITE background with subtle blue and amber accent lines. The diagram shows three horizontal layers connected by arrows. Layer 1 (Frontend Nudge): two triggers — turn_context.py every 10 user turns leading to memory review, and turn_finalizer.py every 10 tool iterations leading to skill review. Layer 2 (Background Review): memory review and skill review converge into background_review, which forks an AIAgent; the fork uses a tool whitelist containing memory and skill_manage, writing outputs to ~/.hermes/skills/ and ~/.hermes/memories/. Layer 3 (Curator): runs periodically on 7 days + 2 hours idle, first applies apply_automatic_transitions (active / stale / archived), then performs an LLM consolidation pass. Use flat rectangular modules, clear arrows, dashed containers for each layer, and bilingual Chinese/English labels. Minimal, tech-forward, light theme, NO dark background, NO mythological elements.
prompt:

Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
